title: Split ChatUpdateInput: id -> param, rename to ChatPatch, derive Default
description:
Current: chat_set_update(&session, &ChatUpdateInput { id, muted, ... })
After: chat_update(&session, id, &ChatPatch { muted: Some(true), ..Default::default() })

Steps:
1. Rename ChatUpdateInput -> ChatPatch, remove id field, derive Default
2. Change chat_set_update signature: add id: &str parameter
3. Update implementation
4. Update all tests
